title: Granddaughter of Donald Trump, Kai, speaks at RNC
shortDescription: Granddaughter of Donald Trump and daughter of Donald Trump Jr., Kai Trump, spoke about her grandfather at the Republican National Convention.

title: SEC alleges executive misled investors about Trump Media acquisition
shortDescription: The Securities and Exchange Commission sued Patrick Orlando, ex-chief of company that helped Trump Media go public, for securities fraud.

title: Which Democrats have called for Biden to step aside?
shortDescription: California Rep. Adam Schiff called on President Biden to drop out of the race Wednesday, joining more than a dozen other Democrats. Here's the list.

title: Jeffries, Schumer warn Biden his candidacy hurts Democrats: reports
shortDescription: The White House said Biden told the leaders that he is the Democratic presidential nominee and plans to win the 2024.

title: How many times has Joe Biden tested positive for COVID?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden tested positive COVID for the third time Wednesday.

title: RNC speeches: Kimberly Guilfoyle, Donald Trump Jr's longtime-fiance
shortDescription: Kimberly Guilfoyle shouted her support during a boisterous speech at the Republican National Convention Wednesday. Watch the whole thing here.

title: At the RNC, Trump's assassination attempt is seen everywhere
shortDescription: What are some of the hottest trends at the RNC? T-shirts featuring a bloodied Donald Trump, raised fists, and ear bandages.

title: President Joe Biden tests positive for COVID again. Here are the facts.
shortDescription: After another positive COVID test - two cases and one relapse - the White House said President Joe Biden "is experiencing mild symptoms."

title: RNC speeches: Former Trump counselor Kellyanne Conway
shortDescription: Kellyanne Conway was a featured speaker at the Republican National Convention Wednesday night. Watch her full speech here.

title: Biden's age makes COVID risky. Is his health in danger?
shortDescription: Biden's vaccination history, good general health and access to medical care lowers his risk of a bad case of COVID, but concern remains.

title: Donald Trump Jr.'s daughter, Kai, will address day 3 of the RNC
shortDescription: Kai Trump, 17, will speak at the Republican National Convention, joining her father, Donald Trump Jr., in addressing the event.

title: Gaetz vows to be Trump's 'strongest ally' at RNC
shortDescription: Florida Rep. Matt Gaetz, took the podium at the Republican National Convention emphasizing that he will be Donald Trump's number one ally in Congress.
